name: Project Footer
prompt_context: A premium, professional footer with social references and official brand text. The legal and operational text should reflect the project's authority.

content_schema.privacy_policy_url: string (URL to Privacy Policy, default to # if unknown)
content_schema.terms_url: string (URL to Terms of Command, default to # if unknown)
content_schema.twitter_url: string (URL to Twitter, default to empty)
content_schema.linkedin_url: string (URL to LinkedIn, default to empty)
content_schema.github_url: string (URL to GitHub, default to empty)
